name: WebGoat Introduction
description: OWASP WebGoat training environment with guided walkthrough and service checks.

walkthrough.title: Launch WebGoat
walkthrough.body: Run `lab start webgoat-intro`. Startup can take up to three minutes.

walkthrough.title: Sign in
walkthrough.body: Open http://127.0.0.1:8080/WebGoat and login with guest / guest.

walkthrough.title: Use WebWolf
walkthrough.body: Open http://127.0.0.1:9090/WebWolf for the companion attacker workspace.
